ddls:
CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message being translated */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language of the translation */,
  "translated_text" TEXT /* Translated text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field worker, coordinator, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster incident */,
  "incident_name" TEXT /* Name of the disaster incident */,
  "disaster_type" TEXT /* Type of disaster (e.g., hurricane, earthquake, flood) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the disaster */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the disaster started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the disaster ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the disaster (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the disaster category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aid_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aid request */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message containing the aid request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of aid requested (e.g., water, food, medical supplies) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of aid requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the aid request (e.g., pending, fulfilled, rejected) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to fulfill the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aid_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aid offer */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message containing the aid offer */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of aid offered (e.g., water, food, medical supplies) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of aid offered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the aid offer (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "offered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user offering the aid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aid_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aid center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the aid center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the aid center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the aid center */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the aid center (e.g., operational, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aid_center_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aid center */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure status entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster incident */,
  "infrastructure_type" TEXT /* Type of infrastructure (e.g., buildings, hospitals, roads) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the infrastructure */,
  "damage_level" TEXT /* Level of damage (e.g., minor, major, destroyed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the infrastructure (e.g., operational, non-operational) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster incident */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of weather report (e.g., forecast, update) */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the weather report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was issued */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the weather report (e.g., UN, local meteorological service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_and_rescue_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search and rescue operation */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster incident */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the operation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the operation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the operation ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the operation (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missing_persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each missing person */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster incident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the missing person */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the missing person */,
  "last_seen_location" TEXT /* Location where the person was last seen */,
  "last_seen_date" TEXT /* Date the person was last seen */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the person (e.g., missing, found, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refugee_camps" (
  "camp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refugee camp */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster incident */,
  "camp_name" TEXT /* Name of the refugee camp */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the camp */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the camp */,
  "current_population" INTEGER /* Current population of the camp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the camp (e.g., operational, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refugee_needs" (
  "need_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refugee need */,
  "camp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the refugee camp */,
  "need_type" TEXT /* Type of need (e.g., food, water, shelter) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the need */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("need_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster incident */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., update, alert, report) */,
  "log_text" TEXT /* Text of the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was made */,
  "logged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message version */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the message version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident update */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster incident */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_and_rescue_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search and rescue team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the team (e.g., available, deployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
